name: GitHub
comments: GitHub runs on Azure with renewable energy commitments. ~5g CO₂/month and ~0.1 kWh/month per active repository is a conservative proxy for storage and CI/CD.

name: S3 / Static Hosting
description: Asset storage and static file hosting. Demo or Staging environments only.
comments: Estimate based on ~0.001 kgCO₂/GB transferred at ~8 GB/month. Energy estimate: ~0.5 kWh/month.

name: Claude Code (AI)
description: Occasional AI assistance, to write tools, CI/CD scripts, or documentation.
comments: GPT-4o benchmarks: ~0.3–0.43 Wh/query. Claude Code sessions estimated at 3× multiplier → ~0.003 kWh/session. Light use: ~4 sessions/day × 20 workdays × 0.003 kWh ≈ 0.24 kWh/month. At ~300 gCO₂/kWh (Anthropic partial renewables) ≈ 20g CO₂/month.

name: Claude Code (AI)
description: AI-assisted development for refactoring, code review, or feature development.
comments: GPT-4o benchmarks: ~0.3–0.43 Wh/query. Claude Code sessions are heavier — estimated 3× multiplier → ~0.003 kWh/session. Heavy use estimated at 40 sessions/day × 20 workdays × 0.003 kWh ≈ 2.4 kWh/month. At ~300 gCO₂/kWh ≈ 200g CO₂/month.

name: Gmail (Google Workspace)
comments: Counted actual sent mail: ~40 emails over 20 workdays (~2/day). 40 emails/month × 0.3g CO₂/email = 12g CO₂/month. kWh estimated at ~0.001 kWh/email → 0.04 kWh/month. Google Workspace runs on carbon-neutral infrastructure.
